---
name: Documentation improvement
about: Report missing, unclear, or incorrect documentation
title: "[docs] "
labels: documentation
---

**What documentation is affected?**
Link to the file or section, e.g. `README.md#installation` or `docs/metrics.md`.

**What is wrong or missing?**
A clear description of the problem — missing content, incorrect steps, unclear explanation, broken link, etc.

**Suggested improvement**
What should it say, or what would make it clearer? A draft is very welcome.

**Context**
Are you a first-time contributor? Did you hit this while trying to run the tool? Any extra context helps us prioritize.
